name: Vatstack

seo.title: Vatstack — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax

when_to_use: VAT number validation API for EU B2B invoicing compliance
VAT rate lookup for accurate tax calculation at checkout
Automating EU VAT exemption checks for B2B transactions

pros: VAT rates lookup for many jurisdictions
cons: Not a full tax engine or filing service
Limited to validation and rate data
review.verdict: Useful focused VAT data API — great as a component, not a full compliance solution.
review.best_for: SaaS and e-commerce teams that just need reliable VAT validation and rate lookups.
review.not_for: Companies wanting end-to-end VAT determination, filing and remittance.
